title: Docker not pulling the latest n8n image
symptom: Despite specifying 'n8nio/n8n:latest', the container runs version 1.93.0 instead of the expected 1.94.1.
not_this_if: The latest version is already running
root_cause: Docker may not pull the latest image if there are existing legacy images or if permissions are not set correctly. This can prevent the update from occurring as expected.
fix_steps: Run 'docker-compose pull' to fetch the latest images.
Run 'docker-compose up -d --force-recreate' to recreate the containers.
Check for legacy images using 'docker images' and remove them with 'docker rmi <image_id>'.
Ensure you have the necessary permissions in Hyper V Admin and security policies.
agent_instruction: Ensure to pull the latest image and remove any legacy images before recreating the container.
